name: Salesforce Privileged Accounts on Personal Email Domains
description: Detects privileged salesforce accounts tied to personal email domains.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.email AS email FROM salesforce_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.is_active, true) = true AND (LOWER(COALESCE(u.role_name, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role_name, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role_name, '')) LIKE '%super%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.profile_name, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.profile_name, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.profile_name, '')) LIKE '%super%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.user_type, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.user_type, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.user_type, '')) LIKE '%super%') AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.email, '')) SIMILAR TO '%@(gmail|yahoo|hotmail|outlook)\\.com'
remediation: Migrate privileged accounts to corporate identity domains and remove personal-domain privileged access.
